description: Composition Brown printed sleeveless top made of 100% polyester, has a small mandarin collar, buttoned chest placket, elasticated at the hip and has a curved hem Fit Regular Wash care Delicate machine wash Do not bleach or tumble dry Cool iron Straight from arrow's design book and into your wardrobe comes this brown printed top. The soft polyester offers exemplary comfort, while the shape flatters your silhouette. Pair it with jeans and heeled sandals for that perfect casual look. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
